label: 🔧 Dev Tools & Utilities
description: Docker, databases, SSH, and essential developer utilities

extensions.name: Remote SSH
extensions.description: Edit files on any remote server over SSH, as if they were local on your machine.

extensions.name: Docker
extensions.description: Manage Docker containers, images, and compose files directly from VS Code.

extensions.name: Database Client
extensions.description: Connect to MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis and more — all inside VS Code.

extensions.name: Hex Editor
extensions.description: Inspect and edit binary files using a hex editor view inside VS Code.

extensions.name: Remote Development
extensions.description: Full remote development pack — SSH, WSL, and Dev Containers in one install.

extensions.name: YAML
extensions.description: Full YAML language support with validation, schema detection, and formatting.
